name: newclaw
description: Agente pessoal de IA 100% local com Telegram

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.join('src','dashboard','public'); const dest=path.join('dist','dashboard','public'); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dest), {recursive:true}); fs.cpSync(src, dest, {recursive:true, force:true}); console.log('Dashboard static files copied to dist/')"
